title: National anthems
description: Mod National anthems - will add music disc with anthems of the countries of the world to minecraft! This mod is perfect for playing with friends or on military-political servers.
body:
## 📜 Short description

**Mod National anthems - will add music disc with anthems of the countries of the world to minecraft! This mod is perfect for playing with friends or on military-political servers.**

## ➕ What does the mod add?

**At the moment, there are already in mod: music discs, crafting and achievements for them, a section in creative, function.**

**Here are the details:**
 1. **Music discs with the anthem of the USSR, Russian Federation, USA,
   Germany, Japan, Ukraine, Poland,
   Russian Empire, RSFSR, Republic of Crimea, Canada, Republic of
   Tatarstan, Islamic Republic of Iran, Free Russia, Uganda, People's Republic of China,   Italy, Turkish Republic, Spain, France, Czechia, Azerbaijan, United Kingdom, Altai Republic, Finland, Republic of China, Algeria, State of Israel, Colombia;**
 2. **[Previously 1.5.5] Empty music disc (required for crafting music disc with anthems);**
 3. **[Previously 1.5] Crafting recipes for music disc (so you can craft records in
            survival!);**
 4. **[ONLY 1.5+] Mechanics, getting music discs, just like in vanilla;**
 5. **[ONLY 1.5.5+] Music discs can be found in simple dungeon (where the mob spawner with chests is located);**
 6. **Achievements, for receiving musical discs;**
 7. **Achievement for getting any national anthem music disc;**
 8. **Achievement for obtaining all national anthem music discs;**
 9. **Collections, in the form of achievements, like: Russian collection, Axis Collection;**
 10. **Function 'give_all_music_disc' to give all music disc with anthems of the countries of the world.**


## 📁 Add-ons for mod
  ### DISCONECTED
 - **Resource pack 32 by 32 pixels: 
*https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/national-anthems-32x32***

## 📝 Contact details

 - **My discord: Donne431#6562 / donne431**
 
 - **Discord server:
   https://discord.gg/NQBhQRDEhF**


- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**
   
## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
2. **The audio files used in this mod are anthems, they are the property of the country and can be used in various materials.**
